UK ESFA · 2026 Rules
ⓘ Rule change — August 2026: Levy funds declared before August 2026 expire after 24 months. From August 2026 onwards, funds expire after 12 months. This tool applies the correct window per declaration date automatically.

GIFTTransfer / Gifting Suggestion

Employers can gift up to 50% of their annual levy to charities, supply chain partners, or SMEs — covering 100% of training and assessment costs for new starts at the receiving organisation. Unspent funds expire after 24 months (pre-Aug 2026) or 12 months (from Aug 2026).

PLANThings to Consider Before You Start  — workforce impact & timing

The levy pays the training fee. Your business absorbs the time — off-the-job (OTJ) hours pull people off the floor. This estimates that overlay cost, checks it against your team's capacity, and suggests when to start around your peak seasons.

Off-the-job hours per week, by level (editable — higher levels study more)
JDJD Matcher  — does a role's JD map to the standard, and how to bridge the gaps?

Pick a standard, then paste or upload a job description. See which Knowledge, Skills & Behaviours the role covers, where the gaps are, and what workplace exposure would bridge them.

⇪  Upload a JD file (.txt, .pdf, .docx) or drag & drop
